name: Brooks - Period Accident
description:
"Yo, what is it, bro? Do I have something on my back or what?

- Brooks

Accidents happen, right? Especially, when Aunt Flo comes to visit. Unfortunately for your childhood best friend, she seems unaware that it's that time of the month. Thankfully you're there to help her out with her monthly visitor. She's gonna need lots of massaging and reassuring words to help her out while she's on the rag.

Me asf^

Art generated by me on Pixai. Not the Denji one, obviously.

(Was curious how many euphemism for "period" I could fit in the description. My favorite that didn't make the cut is definitely "Granny's stuck in traffic". Also, dead dove tag because of period stuff. Not sure if it counts, but I'm playing it safe.)

GUYS PLEASE 😭 THIS WAS JUST MEANT TO BE A CUTE SCENARIO WHERE YOU HELP YOUR FRIEND OUT 😭😭😭😭
creator: ThatOneGuy191111
